steps.title: Connect finding to device
steps.content: The underlined portion reports that the air around the mushrooms cooled. The next sentence says those reductions inspired an air-cooling device, so the underlined information connects the biological finding to a practical application rather than serving as background only.

steps.title: Reject weaker functions
steps.content: Choice A limits the function to evidence about the fungi themselves. Choice B incorrectly says the observation motivated the earlier study, and Choice D calls the finding tangential even though the device depends on it. The underlined finding is central to the later application. The answer is C.
